feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Cannot Generate Handling Unit Using 311 to move storage IM to WM Managed
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Regarding our need to move stock from Sloc IM Managed to WM Managed using 311, we need to automatically generate the Handling Unit. But now, we cannot pack it automatically even if we maintain the packing instructions & determination. Is there any additional configuration needed to maintain automatic packing using movement type 311?

Regards,

Melani

entry.title: Not able to find the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_GLO_GCO_PC
entry.content:
Unable to find the SAP_CA_BC_IC_LND_GLO_GCO_PC business catalog for Activate Document and Reporting Compliance Features.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP MRM: What is the retention period of the job logs in Schedule Treasury Back Office Jobs app?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using Schedule Treasury Back Office Jobs for executing Request Current Market Data job on daily basis.

We would like to know that what would be the retention period of job logs and spools of this job? 

Thanks & regards,

Rushi

entry.title: Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id
entry.content: Business is planning to use the option for all possible reports like GL line-item report, Supplier line items, customer line items, etc. Do we have an option in Public cloud to schedule a report and send to specific mail id

entry.title: Custom CBC Customizations
entry.content:
Hi,

I’m building an integration between SAP Public Cloud and an external system. The external system sends messages via SAP Integration Suite, and some documents need to be created using API calls. In order to do that, I need a mapping that can be customized somewhere in the system.

For example, the external system contains Company Codes that are not part of SAP, and based on those, we need to determine which Company Code in SAP should be used. The client would like this customization to be handled inside SAP and to retrieve the values via web interface when needed.

In this example, we would need a table with two columns, where the first column is the external system’s ID (used as a key), and the second column is the SAP Company Code, for example:

 

External    

SAP

Comp1      

1000

Comp2      

2000

Comp4      

3000

 

The customer wants to manage this data in CBC on CUST/PROD and transport it to TEST and then to PROD using transport requests.

I’ve tried several ways to achieve this:

  1. I created a Custom Business Object and I’m able to access it via web service. It can be maintained on CUST/PROD, but the data cannot be included in a Customizing Transport.
  2. I created Tables using Eclipse and published them locally via Service Bindings. The tables and related objects are in a local package, so I cannot transport this development to the test system. In my opinion this is okay since the objects are local, but I was able to launch the Fiori app "Custom Business Configuration", which saves the data to a Customizing Transport Request. I can release the local request.
  3. Same as point 2, except the objects are in a package assigned to Software Component ZCUSTOM_DEVELOPMENT. The objects were added to a Transport Request that has an ATO route. In this case, the same thing works, but the objects still cannot be transported to the test system because the request cannot be released.

 

Other questions:

  • We use Cloud ALM with scoping. 
  • I have access rights for process authoring but I can not create CBC in it.
  • Is CALM relevant for my problem?
  • I used this Create a SAP Fiori based Table Maintenance app with SAP BTP, ABAP Environment | SAP Tutorials  as template but it is not generally for Public Cloud
  • Annotation @ObjectModel.configuration  is missing. Is that relevant?
  • In CBC when I change scope I do not see "Custom" tile. 
  • Scope is in status Completed and when I wont to edit it I got a strange message "If you edit the scope, one or multiple already confirmed activities and the phase may change. After editing, you need to reconfirm the respective activities.". It is not clear what will happened if I add something.

Now I have only this :

 

And I can use it only on DEV/CUST

What I really want:

 

 

If there are a better solution please inform me.

Thank you

entry.title: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
Simulate sales order using I_SalesOrderTP
entry.content:
I am trying to develop a Fiori app using RAP in SAP Public Cloud and one of the custom action is to do a simulation mode of creating a Sales Order.

Currently, I am using BO I_SalesOrderTP but I dont see an option or a parameter for a test run or simulate.

I tried using Rollback Entities but it doesnt allow in a behavior class.

I understand there are other API that support Sales Order Simulate but I would like to ask if there is a way using business objects.

entry.title: SUNAT Withholding Agents in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Peru Localization
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I’m currently working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using the Peru localization, and I would like to ask if anyone has information about the possibility of mass updating the SUNAT withholding agent data.

As you may know, SUNAT regularly publishes updated files listing current withholding agents. I’m trying to determine whether there is a standard way to import or update this information in bulk, instead of maintaining it manually.

If anyone has implemented this or is aware of an SAP note, best practice, or functionality that supports this kind of update, I’d really appreciate your input.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Luisa Fernanda Ruiz

entry.title: No Foreign Currency Gain/Loss posting generated
entry.content:
In App Perform Foreign currency Valuation Error Account &1 (&2) valuated with valuation area &4 on &3 is shown in Messages 

(& placeholder for real values in run) 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Return PO Reference Linking and Quantity Validation
entry.content:
Hi Expert

In S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, is there a field that displays the original purchase order number associated with a return purchase order? Additionally, when a return PO is created by copying from the original purchase order, is there a system control in place to ensure that the return quantity does not exceed the quantity of the original document?

在 S/4HANA Cloud Public 版本中，請問是否有欄位可以顯示與退貨採購單對應的原始正向採購單號？另外，若是從正向採購單複製建立退貨採購單，系統是否有數量不得超過原始單據的控管機制？

Thank you!

entry.title: How to extend fields for PO Mass upload template ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using RPA  to mass upload PO to Public Cloud system.

We want to add some fields in the template, for example storage location.

What can we do? Please give your advice.

Gloria

entry.title: HANA Memory KPI used in CALM not same as SAP4Me
entry.content:
Hi All

We are finding a difference in the HANA Memory Consumption KPI on CALM Operations and SAP4Me Portal for our S4HANA Public Cloud customer.

Here are the screenshots below

ALM Monitoring

How can we read and explain this data to customer? Please suggest.

Regards

Lakshmi

entry.title: Inquiry about Adapt UI on Dependent Fields in Customization Tenant with Master Data
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

We are currently preparing for a system go-live and following the standard 3-system landscape process. Our Customization Tenant (D/C system) is used for CBC configuration, IMG settings, business role maintenance, and custom report setups. All configurations and extensions are transported to the Test system using the Export Customizing Transports and Export Software Collection apps, and then forwarded to Production after testing.

 

However, we have a requirement to adjust some field labels using Adapt UI for the Project Control - Enterprise Projects Fiori app. The fields that need adaptation only appear after creating a project and selecting a specific project profile, meaning they are context-dependent and not always visible on the default screen.

 

Since we are advised trying not to create any master data in the D/C tenant, we are facing a challenge:

Adapt UI cannot be used unless we create sample master data first.

 

We found SAP Note 2680324 , which seems to suggest that UI adaptations rely on screen context and runtime data. Based on this, we would like to confirm:

  1. Is it acceptable and recommended to temporarily create example master data in the Customization Tenant solely for Adapt UI purposes, and delete them afterward?
  2. Is there an official best practice for handling this situation when the UI elements requiring adaptation are only visible after entering specific master data?
  3. Are there any alternative solutions available that would allow us to perform UI adaptation without creating test master data?

 

Best regards,
Tiffany

entry.title: Check lot create and Print
entry.content:
Hello team,

 

Business wants to have check lot create and check print in the system.

 

we are having a business requirement wherein check lot creation and print is required.

 

kindly provide us the solution as we are not able to create any check lot,

 

Is there any scope ID activation is necessary for the same?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: how to take backup of jobs spools in s4hana cloud?
entry.content:
Hi,

We understand the that the background job spools and logs will be removed after 30 days in S/4HANA cloud.

If we would like to retain them for longer, is it possible to change retention period?

If not, is there anyway by which backup can be taken?

Also, please let us know if is it possible to send them over email?

Thanks

entry.title: Dump issue with MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
We have created RAP class method which will be called during Sales order creation using entity I_SalesOrderTP.
Method is declared FOR ENTITY EVENT salesorder~created and sales order line item field rejection reason is updated using MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_salesordertp
IN LOCAL MODE ENTITY salesorderitem
UPDATE FROM lt_update ( sales line item filled with rejection reason field)
FAILED ls_failed

The above modify statement causes dump 'The ASSERT condition was violated'. Could you please let us know if MODIFY ENTITIES can be used for 'ENTITY EVENT salesorder~created' Please provide solution to update sales order line item field with values during sales order creation.

Thanks & Regards,
Rajeswari

entry.title: The use of Table J_1BBRANCH is not permitted in sap public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am unable to use the table J_1BBRANCH not permitted need to fetch GSTIN detail from this table.

unable to add as inner join or as select query in the class and API state options is also not avaialable.

what is solution for this in Public cloud ?? is there any alternative.

entry.title: AUTo TASK trigger based on QA UD
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

We are unable to determine Auto TASK Creation through the PPF based on Quality UD,

We have find out all cross process settings and  SAP EWM configurations, 

Kindly help to trigger AUTO task based on UD decisions 

 

Regards,



------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: IBP and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Integration
entry.content:
I'm currently setting up the integration between SAP IBP and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and would like to confirm if my understanding is correct. I’d also appreciate links to relevant setup guides for each configuration step.

 My Understanding:

The integration requires three main configurations:

① Communication Settings on the S/4HANA Cloud side
I believe the following 4 communication scenarios are required:

SAP Datasphere - ABAP CDS Extraction - OData Integration (SAP_COM_0531)

Product Integration (SAP_COM_0009)

Business Partner, Customer and Supplier Integration (SAP_COM_0008)

Production Planning Integration (SAP_COM_0104)

Could you please confirm this is correct, and share setup documentation or Help Portal links for each scenario?

② Communication Settings on the IBP side
I understand that SAP_COM_0931 is the scenario used on the IBP side to receive data.
I would appreciate a guide on how to configure this: communication system, communication arrangement, receiving services, etc.

③ Configuration on Integration Suite (BTP)
Before deploying iFlows, I assume that we need to:

Enable services on Integration Suite

Configure connection parameters, such as communication system names and authentication credentials

Could you share specific instructions and documentation for this part?

My Current Setup Status:

Reviewed the Integration Flow package "SAP IBP – Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in BTP

Created communication arrangement SAP_COM_0009 on the S/4HANA Cloud side (see attached screenshot)

No communication configuration on the IBP side yet

Reference Materials I’m Using:

SAP IBP - Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Communication Management | SAP Help Portal

Setting Up the Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition | SAP Help Portal

Please kindly let me know if my assumptions are correct and provide any official setup guides for the scenarios listed above.

entry.title: S4HANA Public Cloud - Controlling - Maintain Plan Version
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We have a client requirement on an implementation project in public cloud. The client wants to maintain "cost plannning", with multiple planning versions.

In S4HANA on premise was possible to maintain multiple planning CO versions.

However, we haven't identified this functionality in the S/4HANA Public Cloud version 2502.

Is this feature available in S/4 Public Cloud? If not, is it in the road map?

Best regards,
Francisco Costa
